project-rules.name: project-rules
project-rules.description: Auto-documentation, sprint planning, and bug tracking rules. Use when completing tasks, adding features, fixing bugs, or creating projects.

ui-ux-pro-max.name: ui-ux-pro-max
ui-ux-pro-max.description: UI/UX design intelligence with searchable database. Use for design, build, create, implement, review, fix, or improve any UI/UX work — web, mobile, or desktop. Provides 67 styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, 25 chart types across 13+ tech stacks (Next.js, React, Vue, Jetpack Compose, React Native, Flutter, SwiftUI). Generates design systems with priority-based recommendations.

prompt-rules.name: prompt-rules
prompt-rules.description: Prompt generation and execution management. Use when generating prompts for tasks, executing pending prompts, running tasks in batch, or creating agent-consumable prompt documents. Triggers: 'generate prompt for', 'create a prompt', 'execute task', 'go with your task', 'execute all tasks', 'run prompt'.
